providerNotReady: Wannan mai ba da shiga ta hanyar sadarwa bai shirya ba.
signupRestricted: Ƙirƙirar asusu an rufe ta admin na uwar garken. Tambayi admin ya ƙirƙiri asusun uwargarken ku, sannan ku shiga.
emailNotReady: Imel bai shirya ba. Duba saitunan Sabis na Imel na Cloudflare.
verificationNotAccepted: Ba a karɓi wannan lambar tabbatarwa ba.
recoveryNotAccepted: Ba a karɓi wannan lambar farfadowa ba.
codeExpired: Lambar shiga ko mahadar ba ta da inganci kuma.
invalidCredentials: Imel ko kalmar sirri ba daidai ba ne.
accountExists: Akwai asusu don wannan email ɗin. Shiga da shi maimakon.
tooManyAttempts: Yawan ƙoƙari ya yi yawa. Dakata na ɗan lokaci kuma sake gwadawa.
serviceUnavailable: Sabis ɗin shiga baya aiki. Duba haɗin ka kuma sake gwadawa.
authOriginMismatch: Adireshin app da uwar garken tabbatarwa ba su yi daidai ba. Sake loda wannan tab ko duba asalin da uwar garken ke yarda.
authRejected: Uwar garken ta ƙi buƙatar tabbatarwa. Duba asusu ko manufar uwar garken kuma sake gwadawa.
linkMissingToken: Wannan mahadar shiga ba ta da token ɗin ta.
passwordTooShort: Kalmar shiga dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 10.
passwordComplexity: Yi amfani da manyan da kananan haruffa, lamba, da alama.
enterVerificationCode: Shigar da lambar tabbatarwa mai lambobi shida.
guestLocalOnly: Samun damar baƙo yana samuwa ne kawai a cikin haɓaka gida.
enterYourVerificationCode: Shigar da lambar tabbatarwa ta ku.
totpHint: Yi amfani da lambar lambobi shida daga app ɗin tabbataccen ku.
recoveryHint: Yi amfani da ɗaya daga cikin lambobin farfadowa da ka ajiye.
name: Suna
setupBlockedTitle: Ba a fara uwar garken ba
setupBlockedBody: Wannan sigar ba ta da wasu asusu tukuna kuma ba a bayar da asusun babba ba. Sake kunna uwar garken da bayanan asusun babba:
setupBlockedHint: Za a ƙirƙiri asusun babba ta atomatik a farawa na gaba.
mustChangeBody: Mai gudanarwa ya ba da kalmar shiga wucin gadi. Zaɓi kalmar shiga ta kanka don ci gaba.
passwordMismatch: Sababbin kalmomin shiga ba su daidaita ba.
changePasswordCta: Canza kalmar sirri kuma ci gaba
actionMissingToken: Wannan mahaɗin aikin asusu bashi da token.
emailChangeVerified: An tabbatar da sabon adireshin imel ɗin ku.
emailVerified: An tabbatar da adireshin imel ɗin ku.
forgotPasswordBody: Shigar da imel ɗin asusun ku. Idan akwai asusu, Hanji zai aika da mahadar sake saiti mai amfani guda ɗaya.
passwordRequirements: Yi amfani da aƙalla haruffa 10, tare da manyan da kananan haruffa, lamba, da alama.
passwordResetComplete: An sake saita kalmar shiga. Shiga da sabuwar kalmar shiga.
passwordResetSent: Idan akwai asusu na wannan imel, an aika da link ɗin sake saiti.
resetPasswordBody: Yi amfani da aƙalla haruffa 10, tare da manyan da kananan haruffa, lamba, da alama.
setupAlreadyComplete: An riga an saita wannan uwar garken ko an karbe shi. Shiga da asusun mai gudanarwa.
setupBody: Ƙirƙiri mai gudanarwa na farko na uwar garken. Hanji zai shigar da kai idan saitin ya cika.
setupCodeHint: Nemo lambar lokaci ɗaya a cikin log ɗin kwandon Hanji. Ba za a taɓa aika ta zuwa wannan shafin ta atomatik ba.
setupCodePlaceholder: Manna lambar daga log ɗin kwandon
setupCodeRequired: Shigar da lambar saitin daga log na kwantena.
setupFailed: Saitin uwar garken ya gaza. Duba log na kwantena kuma sake gwadawa.
setupInvalidCode: Wannan lambar saitin ba daidai ba ce.
